violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register employee with food safety manager certification with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Sanitizer spray bottles adjusted during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door low boy on the coffee line. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink and spray bottles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The hand sink in the back preparation area was observed draining slowly and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Per interview of staff, an employee has completed the course and exam. Employee is waiting on the exam result. Establishment will register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection once employee has received a passing grade. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The holes/gaps in the back storage area shall be sealed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
The ceiling in the food prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Establishment must register a ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (RI license). -Application provided to establishment during this inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
Pastries observed adulterated with fruit flies on pastries. Staff voluntarily disposed of the pastries during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The presence of fruit flies is not controlled as evidenced by live ones in the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. -Establishment must contact pest control to do a full assessment/evaluation. A statement from a licensed professional detailing the plan of action to eliminate the pest must be provided to Inspector upon the next re-inspection date. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment shall register the ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection (RI license). -Application provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

The cutting boards in the sandwich station are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. *This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 10/06/23. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

The ceiling tiles in the back storage area observed in poor repair. Holes/gaps oberved on walls in the back storage area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Ceiling and walls shall be smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. *This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 10/06/23. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings (sun glasses and phone) were observed stored in the sandwich prep area on the prep cutting board. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. -Staff removed the personal belongings during this inspection and cleaned the sandwich prep area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Establishment shall register the ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (RI license). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. -Staff provided hand-washing soap during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

Droppings observed in the back storage area and in the front prep area. Per interview of staff, pest control is active. Establishment will provide proof of pest control. -Establishment shall sweep the back storage area and front prep area. If droppings still observed, establishment must get pest control to do a full assessment/evaluation of facility. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

The cutting boards on the sandwich station are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

The ceiling tiles in the back storage area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Ceiling tiles shall be smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. -All openings/gaps shall be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
